chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2147 of 2020 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.10173/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 25.02.2025 Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate alongwith Mr. Aamir Ali Solangi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Tahir Khalil Dogar, advocate holding brief for Mr. Muhammad Khalil Dogar, advocate for the respondents 2 & 4. Kazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General. Per learned counsel, petition has served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
